# Task Template

Use this template for project work that needs a clear brief.

## Task title

## Problem statement

Describe the issue or opportunity in plain language.

## Desired outcome

State the expected end state.

## Acceptance criteria

- criterion 1
- criterion 2
- criterion 3

## Constraints

- technical constraints
- timeline constraints
- compatibility constraints
- style or dependency constraints

## Known context

- relevant files
- known behaviors
- prior decisions
- existing docs

## Unknowns

- unanswered questions
- assumptions to validate

## Recommended workflow

- research
- plan
- implement
- review

## Validation plan

- tests
- manual checks
- docs to update

## Deliverables

- code, docs, prompts, or plans expected

## Handoff notes

Who acts next and what they need.
